name: Vivacious Conduit
description: Your connection to the First World has grown, and its vital energy flows into you rapidly. If you rest for 10 minutes, you regain Hit Points equal to your @Damage[(@actor.abilities.con.mod*(floor(@actor.level/2)))[vitality,healing]]{Constitution modifier × half your level}. This is a healing vitality effect and is cumulative with any healing you receive from .
